verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In His time, In His time, He makes all things beautiful In His time.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Lord, please show me everyday, As You're teaching me Your way; That You do just what You say, In Your time.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: In Your time, In Your time, You make all things beautiful, In Your time.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord, my life to You I bring; May each song I have to sing, Be to You a lovely thing In Your time.
